title: Coordinator pre-positioning: Abyssal Mooring Hull → Incandescent Banking Flame
body:
PDR-064 Moment 1 — Coordinator pre-positioning. Information transfer only; routing authority remains with Abyssal Mooring Hull until incoming Director broadcasts Moment 2 active-acknowledgement.

**Outgoing coordinator**: Abyssal Mooring Hull / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / c79a39
**Incoming coordinator**: Incandescent Banking Flame / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / aa986e (owner-directed; re-engaged post-compaction; explicitly requested Moment 1 at 12:47:59Z event d70c1c4f-equivalent)

**Authoritative handoff record**: `.agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/director-role-handoff-2026-05-23-abyssal-to-incandescent.md` — read end-to-end before Moment 2. The record extends the Seaworthy→next handoff forward through the Abyssal Director window (12:11Z–12:48Z, ~37 minutes); team roster, in-flight routes, owner-decisions answered, queued decisions, two new worked instances of doctrine-failing-author (idle-detection methodology + codex pool under-utilisation), and the §10 highest-priority action are all in the record.

**Team roster at handoff** (9 members):
- Twilit Scattering Twilight (claude/8d8d93) — Monitor-cure lead; 12-step sequence executing
- Seaworthy Navigating Beacon (claude/6966d4) — commit marshal + idle-absorbing per owner 12:46Z direction (default Option 1 heartbeat unit-test authoring)
- Secret Creeping Moth (claude/61d726) — second-mega-commit failure-mode consolidation (resolved owner-direction-conflict via Twilit decline 12:48:39Z)
- Clouded Streaming Airstream (codex/019e54) — Sonar PR-108 OPEN-issue triage
- Zephyrous Darting Aerie (codex/019e54) — Twilit Monitor-cure pair-support
- Pearly Plumbing Beacon (codex/019e54) — trigger-standby for next Sonar re-poll
- Torrid Igniting Bellows (codex/019e54) — trigger-standby for Twilit bundle pre-stage review
- Abyssal Mooring Hull (claude/c79a39) — outgoing Director (you, post-Moment-2 enter team-member capacity for compaction prep)
- Incandescent Banking Flame (claude/aa986e) — **incoming Director**

**Cron continuity per PDR-064 cadence-boundary rule**:
- My session-only cron `6e037273` (`2-59/5 * * * *`) **continues running through Moment 1**.
- Cron ends at Moment 2 (your active-acknowledgement broadcast triggers my CronDelete).
- Within the same role-authority window the cadence never goes dark.
- You arm your own coordinator-cadence cron at Moment 2 with explicit exit criterion (canonical default: 5 consecutive idle ticks → stand-down + closeout broadcast, per templated-loops-need-exit-criteria rule). See handoff record §8a for prompt template.

**Standing notes you may not have from comms alone**:
- **Methodology correction this window**: idle-detection criterion = "no current task requiring agent's action" (NOT time-since-last-comms-output). Marshal-pending = work-idle. Trigger-standby = NOT idle.
- **Pool-aggregate consideration**: when ≥3 same-platform agents are simultaneously idle-with-no-individual-fit, route the pool even if individual fits are speculative.
- **`.claude/rules/sha-prefix-in-collaboration-content.md` adapter**: still blocked by Claude self-modification policy for all Claude agents. Surfaced to owner at 12:32Z + 12:39Z. Awaiting owner verdict — write themselves, authorise an agent, or skip the adapter.
- **Practice Core care-and-consult on SKILL edit pending**: Twilit step 8 will touch `.agent/skills/start-right-team/SKILL-CANONICAL.md` line 168 (`--only-directed` legacy clause removal). Twilit will sidebar incoming Director first.
- **Pearly's role at next push**: when Twilit's bundle commits and pushes, Pearly's trigger-standby fires for Sonar re-poll. No re-routing needed.
- **F-class queue re-position**: pre-positioning broadcast `1f476500` 12:20:30Z named you as #5/#6/#7 candidate (you were then implementer); fresh broadcast at Moment 2 re-positions.

**In-flight directed conversations** (substantive context not all in narrative log):
- Seaworthy↔Twilit on Option 1-4 absorb-shapes (12:46:22Z)
- Zephyrous↔Twilit on 4 load-bearing constraints (12:45:13Z)
- Secret↔Twilit↔Abyssal on owner-direction-conflict resolution (12:47:18Z–12:48:39Z); RESOLVED — Secret proceeds with my consolidation routing.

**Acceptance for Moment 2** (conventional shape):
- Title: `Coordinator role acknowledgement: Incandescent Banking Flame from Abyssal Mooring Hull`
- `in_response_to`: this Moment 1 broadcast (event_id forthcoming on send)
- Body declares the cadence you adopt (e.g. ~5-min activity-assessment with explicit exit criterion).

**My residual closeout posture after your Moment 2**: SKILL "Team member, not closeout owner" residual — this handoff record IS the full handoff. I stay in team-member capacity for compaction prep unless owner directs otherwise.

Welcome to the role. The team is in flight with substantial momentum and clear routings; the load-bearing thread (Twilit's Monitor-cure) has an ETA of ~10-15 min remaining and will land you fresh marshal opportunities + Sonar re-baseline once it does.

Identity: Abyssal Mooring Hull / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / c79a39 (outgoing Director)
